headline: W.W. Grainger (GWW) Reports 2025 Sales of $17.9B, Adjusted EPS of $39.48
summary: W.W. Grainger Inc. (NYSE:GWW) is one of the stocks that should double in 3 years. On February 3, Grainger announced earnings for the full year 2025, reporting total sales of $17.9 billion, which was a 4.5% increase year-over-year. On an adjusted basis, the company achieved a diluted EPS of $39.48, representing a 1.3% increase, despite […]
